title: Polished GUI
description: Fixes various GUI-bugs aswell as improves the performance
body: # Polished GUI Polished GUI is a project that aims to enhance the user experience by fixing a wide range of UI-related bugs and improving the overall GUI. Some of the main features include: * Faster language loading: > It optimizes resource loading by only loading new language resources when changing languages. This feature significantly reduces the game's load time, making it faster and more responsive * Various layout / inconsistency fixes > Fixes the button layout in the multiplayer screen, fixes the sound volume display aswell as fixes the chat getting cleared when resizing * More seamless and streamlined experience with improved GUI-widgets > Sliders and scrollbars are smoother with improved accessibility --- ### Checkout more quality-of-life mods:
